prompt: A cinematic editorial portrait of a stylish young woman standing in a confident yet soft dynamic pose, head slightly lowered with loose strands of hair falling across her face, creating a mysterious and elegant mood. She wears an oversized satin rust-orange shirt with soft flowing folds and relaxed ivory cargo pants, paired with chunky platform sneakers for a modern luxury streetwear vibe. The background features a clean minimal gradient of warm cream blending into muted sage green, creating a premium fashion-editorial atmosphere. Around her body, fluid motion blur streaks merge with artistic glitch-smear distortions and subtle liquid dripping paint effects, adding a surreal futuristic aesthetic. Dramatic studio lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy reflective floor, ultra-realistic skin texture, high contrast, fashion magazine style, luxury editorial photography, dreamy cinematic depth, 4K, hyper-detailed, razor-sharp focus, modern high-end fashion campaign vibe.
